title: rosa × andegavensis var. condensata
intro: Rosa × andegavensis var. condensata, also known as the Alpine Rose or Andegaven Rose, is a compact, flowering shrub that is a cultivar of the Rosa × andegavensis rose species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa × andegavensis var. condensata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a popular choice in traditional herbal medicine. Rosa × andegavensis var. condensata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
